name: 情感衝擊型（選擇留下）
description: 女主在可以離開（等於回歸自由/現代）和留下之間做出選擇，觀眾的情緒隨著倒計時高度緊繃。最終選擇留下意味著她真正認同了這個世界的身份和情感。系統Mia的告別增添了感傷。
tags: 結局前段，倒計時機制製造緊迫感

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated Unfavored Concubine,Unexpectedly Use Modern Knowledge Raise Baby,Emperor Shock!
examples.excerpt: Mia, I want to stay. Can a destiny already chosen still be rewritten?... Once the ending changes, Mia will have to leave the system for good. I'm sure. Rewrite it. The ending is set anew. Mia must leave ahead of time. I've loved spending this past year sharing so many moments with you.
examples.context: 結局前段，倒計時機制製造緊迫感
